scripts.predev: podman-compose up -d db ollama adminer prometheus alertmanager grafana redpanda redpanda-console redpanda-init
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "server,trigger,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd server && npx trigger.dev@4.4.3 dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.dev:pizza: concurrently --kill-others --names "server,client" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run start:pizza"
